sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_uuids (id UInt32, uuid String, bytes FixedString(16));
INSERT INTO test_uuids (id, uuid, bytes) VALUES (1, '612f3c40-5d3b-217e-707b-6a546a3d7b29', UUIDStringToNum('612f3c40-5d3b-217e-707b-6a546a3d7b29'));
UPDATE test_uuids SET bytes = UUIDStringToNum('9a3f2c70-220e-4a56-a3d1-754831cbf83f') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, uuid, UUIDStringToNum(uuid) AS bytes FROM test_uuids;
SELECT id, uuid, UUIDStringToNum(uuid, 2) AS bytes FROM test_uuids WHERE id = 1;
